methodology: No SabFlow execution telemetry collection exists yet (greps for sabflow_execution_metrics / execution_telemetry / node_invocation_count in src/lib/sabflow, src/lib/observability, src/lib/ops returned no hits — only client UI telemetry and AI token-trim helpers). docs/N8N_MIGRATION_INVENTORY.md ranks nodes by LOC (S/M/L tiers), not by popularity, and no docs/customer-asks or docs/feature-requests directory exists. Bands were therefore derived from public n8n usage signals: (1) the mandated core/control-flow set called out in the C.1.4 spec; (2) n8n nodes-base 'core node' classification (control flow, item-manipulation, generic HTTP/Webhook/Code) which is always top-of-funnel; (3) the W1-B1..B5 wave ordering already encoded in N8N_MIGRATION_INVENTORY.md, which the SabFlow team chose by community popularity; (4) public n8n template-store/community ranking for top SaaS connectors (Slack, Gmail, Google Sheets, OpenAI, Notion, Airtable, HubSpot, Telegram, Discord, Postgres, etc.). currentStatus is best-effort from filesystem inspection of src/lib/sabflow/forge/blocks/** and is set to 'unknown' for nodes I cannot verify without the sibling C.1.1-C.1.3 JSON inventories.
